programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfs are three apples high. Smurflings are twenty-five smurfberries high. Except for Slouchy, who only measures twenty-two smurfberries. Apart from Baby Smurf, Slouchy is the shortest Smurf, and the jibes and taunts of the other Smurflings make him wish he were the tallest of the Smurfs... Now it so happens that Gourdy the Genie loves to grant wishes...

programme.title: How To Smurf A Rainbow
programme.desc: Mother Nature is too busy to conjure a rainbow for the Smurfs' festival, so Papa Smurf borrows her cookbook and mixes up the recipe himself. As there is no yellow available, they use the leprechaun's gold to produce a beautiful rainbow before Gargamel can steal it.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The A-Maze-Ing Smurfs
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf is dying to meet Melchior the Magnificent, creator of the famous Vanishing Box trick. Can Gargamel catch the Smurfs in Melchior's Amazing Maze?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy feels up to the occasion when he starts the recipe for cookies. He is sure to win the contest: he borrowed a recipe from Papa Smurf's Book of Magic. But a big surprise, and some nasty happenings, await poor Brainy... and the whole Village.

programme.title: All The News That's Fit To Smurf
programme.desc: Curious Smurf has an idea: why not print a sheet with all the Village news? He's sure to interest all his readers of the Smurf Tattler. But things don't go exactly to plan when Papa finds super smurfberries.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Because they feel unappreciated, Poet and Painter leave Smurf Village and head for Storm Island, totally unaware that Gargamel is planning to trap them. Papa Smurf and his faithful volunteers rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs love truffles but truffles belong to the Trolls and the Trolls live under Truffle Troll Mountain, where in the shadows of the lake lurks the Thing with No Name...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The village of the Smurfs used to live without a clock. But now suddenly time becomes a precious commodity and Brainy Smurf designs a schedule to take advantage of the new Village clock... Can the Smurfs survive the attacks of time?

programme.title: Bringing Up Bigfeet
programme.desc: Remember Bigmouth, the ogre, and his lovely wife Bignose? They have a baby now: tiny (by ogre standards) Bigfeet. As the Smurflings Snappy, Slouchy and Nat, and of course the ever-willing Sassette are not entitled to baby-sit Baby Smurf, they volunteer to watch over Bigfeet, while its parents are at the Ogre Ball. The little Smurfs will get more than what they expected...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Determined to fly over Smurf village to catch a Smurf to take to the Wizard's Convention, Gargamel invokes his Book of Spells to help him. A series of funny flying machine mishaps occur and Gargamel is once more the laughing stock of the Wizard's Convention.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: Secret Of The Village Well
programme.desc: Why is Clumsy Smurf waiting day and night near the Village well? What is the wish that he wants to be kept secret? How is Gargamel going to be mixed up in this mysterious affair? Is Gargamel going to catch the Smurfs at last?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel has got hold of magical ectoplasmic crystal eggs that will enable him to change bodies with Papa Smurf. What better plan could there be? Disguised as Papa Smurf, he's going to lead all the Smurfs to his cauldron! But as fate would have it, Gargamel is changed into Puppy, the Smurf doggie...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: The Man In The Moon
programme.desc: Sick and tired of not being appreciated, the Man in the Moon quits his job and retires on Earth, to the Village of the Smurfs. The absence of a First Quarter Moon wreaks havoc in the customs of the Smurfs, and Mother Nature and Father Time get dragged in...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Flighty Smurf, as his name implies, can't make his own mind up about anything. The other Smurfs take him to the forest for a survival test in which he can find his way home only by making decisions. He ends up in Balthazar's castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel has found a new diabolical scheme to get rid of the Smurfs: a glittering powder that is going to reduce them to helpless laughter...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel conjures a spell that makes Puppy think he's a cat. Papa receives a prescription from Homnibus to reverse the spell and all the Smurfs help. As Puppy becomes a dog again, Gargamel gets too close and he becomes a cat.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Due to a wild experiment Clumsy is able to store endless knowledge into his memory. Gargamel captures him, trying to unlock Papa Smurf's invisibility formula, but at the last minute, Clumsy tricks him with the wrong ingredients.

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: An evil imp gives Smurfette dancing shoes and then tricks her into promising to marry him. All her little friends rush to her rescue and Papa Smurf magically puts the dancing shoes on the imp. He is forced to dance off into the night.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: The Purple Smurfs
programme.desc: The purple fly bites Lazy and an epidemic starts that turns the little villagers into angry, purple Smurfs. Papa Smurf discovers that the pollen from a tuberose flower is an antidote and soon things are smurfy again.

programme.title: Smurfing For Ghosts
programme.desc: Peewit is at the castle of his friends Selwyn and Tallulah when Uncle Fenwick, the friendly ghost, asks for his help in chasing a few relatives who've come to haunt him... Peewit has to get help from the Smurfs, and a merry chase begins...

programme.title: Educating Bigmouth
programme.desc: The Smurfs try to teach Bigmouth about romance, manners, and getting a job after Bignose kicks him out. He returns to her refined, but Bigteeth is courting Bignose. Bignose realizes what she was missing and takes Bigmouth back to live happily ever after.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Because they feel unappreciated, Poet and Painter leave Smurf Village and head for Storm Island, totally unaware that Gargamel is planning to trap them. Papa Smurf and his faithful volunteers rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs' theatrical production of 'Robin Smurf' comes to life as the legendary hero is portrayed by a really good actor...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy Smurf's misadventures take him across a river into Pussywillow Hollow. There he meets the Pixies – charming and shapely beings whose enemies, the Wartmongers, will meet the Smurfs in some unforeseen ways.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: A Hovel Is Not A Home
programme.desc: In his search for a grander hovel, Gargamel looks in the Great Book of Spells to conjure up a new home. But all of his spells backfire and that convinces him that there's no place like home!

programme.title: The Last Whippoorwill
programme.desc: There are poachers in the Duke of Bedford's forest. They almost succeed in catching the Whippoorwill that lives there... But worse than that, the Duke's son, Chauncey, finds the bird's egg and takes it to the castle for his collection. The Whippoorwill is not doing its insect-eating job anymore, and gnats, mosquitoes, bugs of every type abound. Can the Smurfs restore the Whippoorwill's egg to be nest?

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Dreamy's Pen Pals
programme.desc: When Dreamy decides to visit his friends, the Swoofs, Papa develops a potion to turn the Smurfs into alien-like creatures. But when the potion wears off to soon, Dreamy has to face the reality that the Swoofs do not exist. He is sad until a real alien arrives, returning Dreamy's letter that was delivered by mistake.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A wicked sorceress casts a spell on the Smurfs, forcing them to love themselves and not each other. Vanity, who's always like that, was away at the time, but notices the change when he returns. He breaks the spell by getting all the Smurfs to eat humble pie baked by a wizard.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy Smurf has saved Clumsy from a horrible fate. Clumsy swears eternal devotion to his savior and does his best to repay his debt… With awkward results. A clever scheme is needed to stop Clumsy's well-meant catastrophes...

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: An evil imp gives Smurfette dancing shoes and then tricks her into promising to marry him. All her little friends rush to her rescue and Papa Smurf magically puts the dancing shoes on the imp. He is forced to dance off into the night.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Everybody can make a mistake. Take Papa Smurf, for instance. His new perfume-enhancing spray makes a rose smell like a thousand roses...but due to a whole series of misadventures it also makes all the Smurfs cry, moved to tears by the slightest of pretexts. While they sob, bawl, wail moan and whimper, the evil wizard Gargamel does not stand still...

programme.title: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals
programme.desc: Brainy dons his safari hat and roams the forest to do good deeds for animals. He mostly gives advice to the creatures but balks when he can really save the life of a wildcat being hunted by Gargamel. Nat gives Brainy the courage to free the cat from Gargamel's trap.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In an effort to find out where the Smurfs' secret diamond stash is hidden, Gargamel pretends to be their friend. When he shows his true, wicked self, Papa Smurf works a magic spell to save his little Smurfs from the vicious clutches of the evil wizard.

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: No Time For Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy, Brainy, Clumsy, and Smurfette discover the hourglass of time in a cave and due to their bungling, time spins erratically out of control for all of the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes
programme.desc: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills… With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Baby Smurf has lost all interest in toys. Even Jokey's surprises fail to amuse the tiny tyke. Grandpa Smurf suggests they go and pay a visit to the Toymaker, the one who makes toys for children all over the world. Or rather used to make: the Toymaker is tired of the lack of appreciation his toys receive from those who receive them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Tis The Season To Be Smurfy
programme.desc: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel pours a glue-like potion on Clumsy and when anyone touches him, they become stuck to him. The Smurfs become linked to each other until Papa grabs Gargamel's nose. Gargamel, who is annoyed at having all the Smurfs stuck to him, devises a counter-potion and the Smurfs are free once more.

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha the witch promises Gargamel a magical whistle if he will introduce her to the warlock of her dreams. But they are both deceived by each other's trickery: Gargamel dresses up as the warlock, and Hogatha's magical whistle is only a birdcall.

programme.title: Alarming Smurfs
programme.desc: Feeling unwanted, the Smurflings run away. They take things to remind them of home, so the Smurfs think there's a thief in their midst. Brainy tries to catch the thief by installing smurfler alarms. The alarms cause a ruckus that draws the Smurflings home, where Papa tells them they are wanted.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Bigmouth steals the Smurfs' winter food supply and Brainy concocts one of Papa Smurf's magic strength potions so he can fight the greedy giant. The super formula wears off, but Papa Smurf works a fast switch, replacing the food with rocks and Bigmouth is none the wiser.

programme.title: The Village Vandal
programme.desc: Nasty wizard Gargamel has had enough of the Smurfs' permanent superiority. He decides to destroy their Village once and for all. This is why he trains a termite to ravage, demolish, devastate and raze all the houses in its path. But the effect is even worse than Gargamel imagined as the Smurfs think that their Village is being torn apart by the antics of the Smurflings.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It's not his fault. Clumsy Smurf never stops causing catastrophes, and even when Papa Smurf sends him to the forest on a single errand, he brings back a cloud of bad luck the shadow of which causes misfortune to anyone – or any Smurf – under it... Papa Smurf is going to need all his resources to find a cure: the silver lining that every dark cloud ought to have!

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Marco Smurf And The Pepper Pirates
programme.desc: The Smurfs sail off in their sailing boat to save Marco Smurf, who has been captured at sea by Captain Pepper. Marina and a dolphin help to free Marco.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf recalls Dreamy's exciting voyage on the high seas and his gripping adventures with sea turtles, whales, desert islands... and pirates!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Primera Navidad De Bebe Pitufo
programme.desc: La ilusión de Navidad se ve frustrada cuando Chlorhydris hechiza a San Nicolás para que no pueda repartir felicidad en Navidad. Afortunadamente, Papá Pitufo y los demás pitufos consiguen romper el hechizo y devolver la Navidad a su bosque.

programme.title: Pitufo En Rascacielos
programme.desc: Está claro que una aldea de casas con forma de seta es bonita y alegre… Sin embargo, no resulta muy moderna a los ojos de Pitufo Arquitecto. Lo que los Pitufos necesitan es un rascacielos, un nuevo y atrevido concepto que cambiará su forma de vivir para siempre…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufitos acompañan a Pitufo Lanudo en su misión de esquilar ovejas para obtener lana para la ropa de invierno. Deben superar varios obstáculos, como Gargamel, un lobo y, por último, un pastorcillo que no acepta pitufrutas como pago por la lana. El respeto mutuo entre los Pitufitos y Pitufo Lanudo va creciendo a lo largo del viaje.

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces… pero Pitufo Filósofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papá Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha…

programme.title: Peligro En La Aldea
programme.desc: El pérfido mago Gargamel está harto de la constante superioridad de los Pitufos. Decide destruir su aldea de una vez por todas. Con ese fin, entrena una termita para que destroce, demuela, devaste y destruya todas las casas que se encuentre en su camino. Sin embargo, los efectos son mucho peores de lo que Gargamel había imaginado, ya que los Pitufos creen que las travesuras de los Pitufitos son las que están destruyendo su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Bebé Pitufo ha perdido el interés por los juguetes. Ni siquiera las sorpresas de Pitufo Bromista consiguen entretener al pequeño. Abuelo Pitufo propone hacer una visita al Juguetero, el encargado de fabricar juguetes para los niños de todo el mundo. O más bien, el que los fabricaba: el Juguetero está cansado del poco aprecio que demuestran por sus juguetes aquellos que los reciben.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Fortachón descubre a un caballero que lo ayuda a combatir a un Dragón, pero éste huye y deja a Fortachón defendiendo a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Soñador verá cumplido su deseo de ser un Astropitufo cuando Papá Pitufo le hechiza para quedarse dormido, transformando el paisaje y a los Pitufos en una fantasía galáctica. Gargamel vigila de cerca las travesuras de los Pitufos desde su bola de cristal, pero el hechizo de Papá Pitufo también tiene efecto en él y le transporta hasta el centro de una tormenta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Práctico aprende que es mejor haber pitufado que no haber pitufado nunca cuando descubre que su amor verdadero es una sirena. ¿Podrán vivir juntos para siempre?

programme.title: Los Amigos De Soñador
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Soñador decide visitar a sus amigos, los Tufos, Papá Pitufo crea una poción para transformar a los Pitufos en criaturas de aspecto alienígena. Sin embargo, los efectos de la poción desaparecen demasiado pronto y Pitufo Soñador tiene que enfrentarse a la realidad de que los Tufos no existen. Está triste hasta que llega un alienígena de verdad para devolver a Pitufo Soñador su carta, ya que la recibió por error.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En su búsqueda de algo novedoso, Pitufo Vanidoso se pone un sombrero mágico creado por Gargamel que le deja la cara hecha un adefesio. Mediante una argucia, Papá Pitufo consigue robarle el antídoto al malvado mago, logrando así que Pitufo Vanidoso recupere su belleza.

programme.title: El Amigo Más Pitufo
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo tenía un amigo: Pitufo Torpe. Pero el pobre Pitufo Torpe es tan… bueno, torpe, que Pitufo Filósofo no quiere volverle a ver. Así que ahora no queda nadie dispuesto a escucharle. Quizá Buddy, el apuesto diablillo que ha conocido por casualidad cerca del gran roble, pueda convertirse en amigo de Pitufo Filósofo…

programme.title: La Absopitufiasombrosa Máquina
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa una máquina que hará que los Pitufos controlen el clima a su voluntad.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El chico del bosque y Laconia, la elfa muda y sorda, preguntan a Papá Pitufo que celebre su boda. Mientras los Pitufos preparan la fiesta bajo las órdenes de Pitufina, Gargamel hace acto de presencia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo se encuentra indefenso cuando se le acaban las bayas mágicas que utiliza para sus pociones. Afortunadamente, los pequeños Pitufos encuentran un bebé de dragón en el bosque y con su ayuda…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado hechicero Gargamel acude una vez más a Esmeralda, la adivinadora, la cual se las ingenia para hacerse con el dinero de Gargamel. Cuando es el turno de los Pitufos, les hace creer que existe un árbol de la suerte…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol también congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante mágico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante mágico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha tenido una nueva y revolucionaria idea: una especie de carro que se mueve sobre raíles y no requiere que los Pitufos tiren de él. Lo llama pitufitren y hace que la vida en la aldea resulte menos cansada… hasta que Gargamel lo descubre.

programme.title: Pitufo Sabelotodo
programme.desc: Nadie escucha nunca los consejos de Pitufo Filósofo, así que, cuando Papá Pitufo se va de viaje y Pitufo Filósofo cree estar al mando, decide que va a ser el que tenga todas las respuestas. El libro de hechizos de Papá Pitufo contiene una fórmula mágica para garantizar que todos los habitantes de la Aldea Pitufa acudan a Pitufo Filósofo para pedirle su opinión. Y, por si las cosas no fueran lo suficientemente complicadas, aquí llega Gargamel…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nueva obra de Pitufo Poeta va a ser su mayor creación de todos los tiempos, y contará con Pitufina, la preferida de todos, como actriz principal. Los demás Pitufos compiten por el honor de actuar junto a Pitufina. Incluso Pitufo Tímido, que es muy discreto y retraído, es uno de los candidatos al papel. Pero Pitufo Filósofo, que se ha autodesignado director de la obra, no lo ve de la misma manera…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Pitufo Que Queria Ser Rey
programme.desc: Pitufo Soñador anhela convertirse en rey después de leer una historia sobre reyes. Mientras está en su barco, cae a través de un remolino y llega a una tierra de pequeños seres que creen que Pitufo Soñador es su rey, desaparecido hace mucho tiempo. Cuando se enfrenta a los Norfnangs, los enemigos de esos pequeños seres, descubre que no son terroríficos en absoluto. Pitufo Soñador se da un golpe en la cabeza y descubre al despertar que todo había sido un sueño, aunque encuentra en su gorro una joya idéntica a las que extraían esos pequeños seres de su mina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo está horrorizado. Sasita no sabe leer, por lo que podría estar condenada a perderse las perlas de sabiduría que contiene su libro «Citas de Pitufo Filósofo». Así pues, intenta enseñarla a leer. Sin embargo, resulta que casi lo primero que puede leer es una fórmula para hacer que todos los libros desaparezcan. Todos los libros del mundo, ¡incluidos el libro de hechizos de Gargamel y los libros de remedios de Ómnibus!

programme.title: Fortachón Y Pitufina
programme.desc: Pitufo Fortachón descubre lo que es estar incapacitado cuando se rompe la pierna. Pitufo Carpintero crea para él una pitufisilla de ruedas, un invento que le proporcionará algo de movilidad a Pitufo Fortachón. Pero, de repente, el malvado mago Gargamel aparece en escena.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Bebé Pitufo ha perdido el interés por los juguetes. Ni siquiera las sorpresas de Pitufo Bromista consiguen entretener al pequeño. Abuelo Pitufo propone hacer una visita al Juguetero, el encargado de fabricar juguetes para los niños de todo el mundo. O más bien, el que los fabricaba: el Juguetero está cansado del poco aprecio que demuestran por sus juguetes aquellos que los reciben.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Mientras los pitufos construyen cápsulas del tiempo para guardar sus talentos, Papá Pitufo está tratando desesperadamente de acertar un acertijo druídico antes de que un gran desastre llegue al bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado primo del Rey, Malcolm, lo ha convertido en un ciervo negro para poder acabar con él y ponerle en su sala de trofeos. Los Pitufos irán a ayudar a su amigo y, tras devolver al Rey a su verdadera forma, Malcom acabará preso dentro del cuerpo del ciervo negro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las pinturas del malvado Maestro son capaces de tele portar a sus modelos dentro del cuadro…para siempre! Papá pitufo le dice a Pintor que cambie las pinturas y en poco tiempo Maestro acaba dentro de uno de sus cuadros, al lado de su modelo de ensueño: Pitufina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: No es culpa suya. Pitufo Torpe nunca deja de provocar catástrofes, e incluso cuando Papá Pitufo le manda al bosque a hacer un recado, vuelve acompañado de una nube de mala suerte cuya sombra causa infortunios a cualquiera (o a cualquier Pitufo) que esté bajo ella… Papá Pitufo tendrá que echar mano de todos sus recursos para encontrar una cura ¡y encontrar la cara brillante que cada nube oscura debería tener!

programme.title: El Pitufo Galante
programme.desc: La reina Agripina no dejará que su hijo, el príncipe Godofredo, se case con la dulce Priscila. Ella quiere como nuera a una chica que sea capaz de mostrarle algo que nunca antes haya visto. Cuando Hogata se entera y descubre la existencia de Abuelo Pitufo, está segura de que logrará sorprender a la reina con su captura. Por supuesto, Hogata debe atrapar primero a Abuelo Pitufo…

programme.title: Los Pitufos Y El Árbol Del Dinero
programme.desc: El mago malvado Gargamel ha elaborado otro plan diabólico con la ayuda de su madre, quien no es más agradable que él. Él quiere persuadir a los Pitufos con dinero pero ellos no saben lo que les espera. ¿Pitufo Goloso caerá en la trampa?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogata consigue los pendientes dorados mágicos de Sonoria, que le permitirán oír las voces de los Pitufos desde lejos. Siguiendo los ronquidos de Pitufo Perezoso, está a punto de llegar hasta la Aldea Pitufa, pero entonces los sonidos del cuerno de Pitufo Armonía comienzan a resonar en sus pendientes y huye enfurecida de vuelta a casa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Viaje Al Pitufo De La Tierra
programme.desc: El invierno ha llegado a la Aldea Pitufa. Y los pequeños Pitufos están helados de frío. ¿Pero qué está haciendo Pitufo Torpe con esa extraña roca que ha descubierto? ¿Y por qué está tan entusiasmado Pitufo Minero con su nuevo descubrimiento? Nadie entiende a qué se debe tanto revuelo por una simple nueva roca para la colección de Pitufo Torpe… Al adentrarse bajo tierra, los Pitufos encontrarán peligros y sorpresas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El pantano de Greenpeedeepee es el único lugar donde se pueden encontrar unas algas que son el delicioso e imprescindible ingrediente del famoso estofado de algas de Pitufo Goloso. Desafortunadamente, también es un lugar donde te puedes topar con los desagradables Verrugosos. A pesar de que Sasita y los Pitufos le salvan la vida a un joven Verrugoso, acaban siendo apresados por los demás. ¡Pero el Enmascarado Escarlata los salvará! Quizá…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Habia Una Vez Una Luna Azul
programme.desc: Una noche de Luna Azulada, tal y como la leyenda decía, un bebé pitufo aparece en el pueblo, y todos acaban cogiéndole cariño. Pero todo ha sido un malentendido y la cigüeña vuelve a por el bebé. Pintor y Gruñón se han encariñado tanto con el bebé que la acaban devolviéndoles el bebé.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Caballo Anaranjado De Los Zapatos De Oro
programme.desc: Deslizándose por un arcoíris, un caballito alado pierde una herradura dorada. Tras encontrarse con Pitufina, ambos van en su búsqueda. Al final, acaban encariñándose ya que quién podría resistirse al encanto de un caballito alado…o de Pitufina?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Para tratar de descubrir dónde se encuentra el escondite secreto de diamantes de los Pitufos, Gargamel finge ser su amigo. Cuando muestra su verdadera naturaleza malvada, Papá Pitufo conjura un hechizo mágico para salvar a sus pequeños Pitufos de las garras maliciosas del mago malvado.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La repulsiva bruja Hogata captura a Pitufina. Quiere robarle a la pequeña belleza azul su cabello dorado. ¿Conseguirán salvar los Pitufos a su pequeña compañera antes de que sea demasiado tarde? ¿Logrará Hogata una cabellera como la de Pitufina?

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces… pero Pitufo Filósofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papá Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha…

programme.title: La Carrera De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha ideado un nuevo invento: el pitufimóvil. Todos los Pitufos tienen su propio vehículo personalizado y todos (o casi todos) disfrutan dando una vuelta en ellos. Sin embargo, el malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la idea y empieza a causar problemas a los Pitufos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay algún tipo de poder maligno en la corona del Titan que Minero encuentra bajo tierra, y Avaricioso acaba sucumbiendo a él. Cuando Gargamel aparece con una de sus fechorías en mente, todo se acaba enrevesándose.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo organiza un grupo para navegar a una lejana isla ya que Gargamel ha cortado todos los árboles menos uno para atrapar a los pitufos. Gargamel les sigue pero la Bruja de la isla acaba enviando sus gaviotas tras él.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nota que Papá Pitufo escribió avisando a los demás Pitufos para que vean un cometa está rota. Al ser sólo capaces de leer una parte, los Pitufos creen que es el fin del mundo. Todos planean cómo será su último día, hasta que papá Pitufo regresa y clarifica el lío.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Cama Voladora De Papa Pitufo
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a la nueva cama de Papá Pitufo para que cualquiera que duerma en ella sea transportado al lugar con el que esté soñando. Los ensueños de los Pitufos les llevan a un barco, un castillo y, por último, hasta Gargamel. Consiguen escapar cuando Pitufo Torpe se queda dormido y sueña con su hogar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel roba el reloj de arena de Padre Tiempo con la intención de viajar al pasado y destruir a los Pitufos, a quienes culpa de que su vida sea un fracaso. Sus planes se ven frustrados cuando aparece Gigantón y rompe el hechizo, que solo duraría mientras nadie viera a Gargamel.

programme.title: El Pitufo Osado
programme.desc: Esta vez, Gargamel tiene un plan infalible. Sin hacer caso de la risa burlona de Azrael, el malvado hechicero ha perfeccionado una sustancia mágica a la que ha llamado «polvo temerario», que convertirá a todos los Pitufos en temerarios e intrépidos aventureros. ¿Caerá Papá Pitufo en la trampa de Gargamel? ¿Atrapará su enemigo a todos los Pitufos? ¿Tendrá esta historia un final feliz?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Pitufo Que Queria Ser Rey
programme.desc: Pitufo Soñador anhela convertirse en rey después de leer una historia sobre reyes. Mientras está en su barco, cae a través de un remolino y llega a una tierra de pequeños seres que creen que Pitufo Soñador es su rey, desaparecido hace mucho tiempo. Cuando se enfrenta a los Norfnangs, los enemigos de esos pequeños seres, descubre que no son terroríficos en absoluto. Pitufo Soñador se da un golpe en la cabeza y descubre al despertar que todo había sido un sueño, aunque encuentra en su gorro una joya idéntica a las que extraían esos pequeños seres de su mina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: No todos los días se encuentra uno con una flor parlante. Y, en especial, con un personaje como Petaluma, una planta bulbosa algo arrogante con la que Pitufina se encuentra en el bosque. Por supuesto, Pitufina se muestra encantada y lleva a Petaluma con ella a la Aldea Pitufa… desencadenando un proceso que pondrá en peligro a todos los Pitufos. Parece que las flores están hechas para contemplarlas y no para escucharlas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La vida en la Aldea Pitufa podría ser más tranquila si Puppy se comportara un poco mejor. Sin embargo, el pequeño perro de los Pitufos se dedica a escarbar entre las flores de Pitufina, ensuciar el nuevo papel pintado de Pitufo Vanidoso y arruinar los experimentos de Papá Pitufo. Aun así, Puppy va a ayudar a los Pitufos a escapar de una trampa que les ha tendido Gargamel. O quizá no tenga la disciplina necesaria para ello…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un hechizo ha alterado las cajas sorpresa explosivas de Pitufo Bromista. Imagina la cara de desconcierto que se le queda a este guasón cuando se da cuenta de que todas las sorpresas que entrega a otros incautos Pitufos en realidad contienen regalos. ¡Se acabaron las explosiones, las bromas y la diversión! Y a eso se le une su poco envidiable posición como el Pitufo más popular de la aldea, rodeado de admiradores que no cesan de pedirle más obsequios…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos sabemos que Pitufo Gruñón odia varias cosas. Pero la cosa que odia más que nada es el agua, cuando hay suficiente para que se pueda ahogar. Pitufo Gruñón no sabe nadar. Y cuando los Pitufos notan esto y le tratan de enseñar cómo sobrevivir en el agua, el malvado mago Gargamel hace que todo sea un poco más peligroso de lo que debería ser...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Te despiertas temprano por la mañana, antes de que los demás Pitufos se hayan levantado de sus camas, para preparar sabrosos bizcochos de pitufrutas. Dedicas toda la mañana a preparar pitufimanjares para el almuerzo. Después, toda la tarde a tener la deliciosa cena lista a tiempo. ¿Y acaso los demás Pitufos te dan siquiera las gracias? Así pues, Pitufo Goloso renuncia. La aldea está en problemas… y pronto, también lo está Pitufo Goloso.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demás Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males…con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es cierto: lo bueno en exceso puede ser malo. Cuando se produce un accidente que afecta a la fórmula mágica de Papá Pitufo y este acaba duplicado, los Pitufos se muestran encantados: dos Papás Pitufo pueden dar el doble de buenos consejos y el doble de amor que uno solo. Sin embargo, después de un tiempo, las cosas se complican en exceso en la aldea. ¡Sobre todo cuando otro accidente hace que Gargamel también se duplique!

programme.title: Dilo Por Ti Mismo, Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador esconde su amor por Pitufina ocultándose en el anonimato y enviándole poemas. Cuando finalmente se encuentran, Gigantón les captura y, en sus esfuerzos por escapar, descubren su afecto mutuo.

programme.title: Pitufo Sobre Ruedas
programme.desc: Cada año, todos los Pitufos recorren la larga senda hasta llegar a unos manantiales termales de ensueño. Sin embargo, este año únicamente Abuelo Pitufo, Papá Pitufo y Pitufo Natural harán la caminata hasta ese lugar. Los demás Pitufos están demasiado atareados (o son demasiado vagos) como para caminar. Entonces, Pitufo Carpintero llega con lo que él llama su pitufurgón personalizado. Ya no es necesario andar: basta con ir sobre ruedas hasta allí… Por supuesto, las cosas no serán tan sencillas como parecen.

programme.title: El Regreso De Don Pitufo
programme.desc: Cuando una gota de la nueva poción de Papá Pitufo cae en el libro de aventuras de los Pitufitos, el héroe de ficción cobra vida. El intrépido Don Pitufo, que desea deshacer a los Pitufos del malvado Gargamel, lo captura con valentía…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebatarán todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo… hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: El Genio De Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador se pregunta qué hace una calabaza en el melonar, cuando debería estar junto a los colinabos. Cuando Pitufo Labrador tira de la calabaza y la separa del suelo, libera a un genio que comienza a llamarle amo e insiste en concederle deseos. El ansia del genio, llamado Gourdy, por complacer a Pitufo Labrador hará que, más que en una ayuda, se convierta en una molestia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Patoso y sus desventuras le llevan a través de un río a un lugar desconocido. Allí conoce a las duendecillas, unas adorables criaturitas cuyos enemigos acabarán encontrándose con los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotín para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filósofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos aman las trufas y las trufas son de los Trolls. No será nada fácil que los pitufitos azules tengan un banquete.

programme.title: El Pitufo Galante
programme.desc: La reina Agripina no dejará que su hijo, el príncipe Godofredo, se case con la dulce Priscila. Ella quiere como nuera a una chica que sea capaz de mostrarle algo que nunca antes haya visto. Cuando Hogata se entera y descubre la existencia de Abuelo Pitufo, está segura de que logrará sorprender a la reina con su captura. Por supuesto, Hogata debe atrapar primero a Abuelo Pitufo…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¡Madre mía! A Sasita se le ha caído un diente. Papá Pitufo le explica que, si coloca el diente bajo la almohada, encontrará un obsequio del hada de los dientes al día siguiente. Sin embargo, a la mañana siguiente no hay ningún regalo debajo de la almohada. El hada de los dientes no ha acudido. Resulta que está atrapada en una de las trampas de Gargamel. Y ahora, el malvado mago está tramando un terrible plan.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel está decidido a sobrevolar la Aldea Pitufa para atrapar a un Pitufo y llevarlo a la Convención de los Magos, e invoca a su libro de hechizos para que le ayude. Esto da lugar a una serie de divertidos contratiempos con su máquina voladora, y Gargamel vuelve a convertirse en el hazme reír de la Convención de los Magos.

programme.title: ¿Cómo Hacer Un Arcoíris?
programme.desc: La madre naturaleza está demasiado ocupada para evocar un Arcoíris para el Festival de los Pitufos, así que Papá Pitufo pide prestado su libro de cocina para realizar la mezcla él mismo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos van al rescate de dos niños y su abuelo, cuando un misterioso extranjero aparece haciendo que su trineo se rompa en pedazos. Al llamar a la puerta de Gargamel en busca de ayuda, no se dan cuenta de que están poniendo en peligro sus vidas y la de los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Primera Palabra De Bebe Pitufo
programme.desc: Los Pitufitos liberan a los Pitufos de las garras de Gargamel justo a tiempo para llevar a Bebé Pitufo a la ceremonia de su primera palabra. Bebé Pitufo pronuncia la palabra «Gargamel». Papá Pitufo afirma que esa palabra indica que Bebé Pitufo se convertirá un día en un gran líder, ya que significa que es consciente de los peligros de la vida.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Durante una misión para interrumpir la fiesta de Halloween de los Pitufos, Gargamel y Hogatha consiguen capturar a Perezoso, el cual se ha vuelto rojo por un extraño capricho de la naturaleza. Papá Pitufo y los demás conseguirán liberar a Perezoso, y la Madre Naturaleza devolverá su color al pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En un esfuerzo por conseguir que Papá Pitufo tenga algo de tranquilidad, Pitufo Filósofo usa uno de los hechizos de Papá Pitufo para crear una barrera de sonido mágica alrededor de la aldea. Papá Pitufo no es capaz de deshacer el hechizo y envía a los Pitufitos, que han quedado atrapados fuera de la aldea, a un hacedor de ruidos. Bebé Pitufo se lleva una botella de ruido de casa del hacedor de ruidos, y así consiguen romper la barrera.

programme.title: La Venganza De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Se ha desatado una guerra en la Edad Media. Unos caballeros vestidos con armadura destrozan por accidente la Aldea Pitufa, lo que provoca que una pequeña banda de Pitufos decida vengar esta afrenta. ¿No pensará Papá Pitufo que esta es una acción demasiado propia de los humanos?

programme.title: Los Amigos De Soñador
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Soñador decide visitar a sus amigos, los Tufos, Papá Pitufo crea una poción para transformar a los Pitufos en criaturas de aspecto alienígena. Sin embargo, los efectos de la poción desaparecen demasiado pronto y Pitufo Soñador tiene que enfrentarse a la realidad de que los Tufos no existen. Está triste hasta que llega un alienígena de verdad para devolver a Pitufo Soñador su carta, ya que la recibió por error.

programme.title: Pitufos Y Solo Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel ha conseguido capturar a Pitufina. Ahora, se dispone a administrarle un suero de la verdad para descubrir todos los secretos de Papá Pitufo… pero Gargamel comete un gran error y le da a Pitufina una fórmula de las mentiras.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo está harto. Los Pitufitos y Sasita siguen inventándose historias sobre él con desagradables consecuencias. Por eso, prepara una fórmula mágica, extraída del libro de hechizos de Papá Pitufo, que hace que los pequeños Pitufos crezcan y crezcan cada vez que dicen mentiras. Pero no había contado con que ahora Gargamel tiene una forma de capturar a los Pitufitos.

programme.title: Peligro En La Aldea
programme.desc: El pérfido mago Gargamel está harto de la constante superioridad de los Pitufos. Decide destruir su aldea de una vez por todas. Con ese fin, entrena una termita para que destroce, demuela, devaste y destruya todas las casas que se encuentre en su camino. Sin embargo, los efectos son mucho peores de lo que Gargamel había imaginado, ya que los Pitufos creen que las travesuras de los Pitufitos son las que están destruyendo su aldea.

programme.title: Símbolos De Sabiduría
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo está desesperado por parecerse más a Papá Pitufo. ¿Podría ser la respuesta un tónico capilar? ¿Conseguirá Gargamel capturar por fin a los Pitufos? ¿Reside realmente la sabiduría en una barba?

programme.title: Medicina Para Bromista
programme.desc: Por culpa de todas las bromas que gasta Pitufo Bromista, ningún Pitufo le cree cuando les avisa de que el gato Azrael está a punto de atacarlos. Como se siente culpable, se dirige al castillo de Gargamel y le gasta unas cuantas bromas muy explosivas al mago y a su gato para poder liberar a sus amigos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el Pitufo Filósofo pierde sus gafas deja caer las cosas, tropieza con los objetos, y se convierte en tan patoso como el Pitufo Tontín, que ahora tiene que leer a Filósofo y ayudarle a manejarse. Esta experiencia hace que Filósofo se sienta culpable por la forma en la que siempre se ha burlado de Tontín. Una vez que recibe un nuevo par de gafas, le trata con más respeto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es cierto: lo bueno en exceso puede ser malo. Cuando se produce un accidente que afecta a la fórmula mágica de Papá Pitufo y este acaba duplicado, los Pitufos se muestran encantados: dos Papás Pitufo pueden dar el doble de buenos consejos y el doble de amor que uno solo. Sin embargo, después de un tiempo, las cosas se complican en exceso en la aldea. ¡Sobre todo cuando otro accidente hace que Gargamel también se duplique!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nota que Papá Pitufo escribió avisando a los demás Pitufos para que vean un cometa está rota. Al ser sólo capaces de leer una parte, los Pitufos creen que es el fin del mundo. Todos planean cómo será su último día, hasta que papá Pitufo regresa y clarifica el lío.

programme.title: Life's Funniest Moments
programme.desc: Te traemos los momentos más divertidos jamás captados por la cámara.

programme.title: Life's Funniest Moments
programme.desc: Te traemos los momentos más divertidos jamás captados por la cámara.

programme.title: Minecraft videos with JeromeASF
programme.desc: Welcome to my channel! I love playing Minecraft, Fortnite and a bunch of other games. My goal is to have as much fun as possible and provide entertaining videos for everyone! I hope you all enjoy!

programme.title: Minecraft, Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus oth

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! Follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game: 'Duel Monsters.'

programme.title: Roblox DOORS with Thinknoodles!
programme.desc: Thinknoodles plays Roblox Doors horror game in ROBLOX!

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways. Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Super Mario RPG

programme.title: Minecraft videos with JeromeASF
programme.desc: Welcome to my channel! I love playing Minecraft, Fortnite and a bunch of other games. My goal is to have as much fun as possible and provide entertaining videos for everyone! I hope you all enjoy!

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Give new life to old favorites. Sewing teacher and author Rebecca Kemp Brent alters fashions with gussets for a new fit. Pattern designer Angela Wolf adds a front placket to a shirt dress. Curvy fashion expert Jenny Rushmore eliminates darts to create flattering princess seams.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Hold onto your needles! Tracie and Jodi, are here to dish out fresh fiber inspiration. From project picks to wooly good gossip, things are about to get super knitty… and maybe just a little nutty.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: One of the keys of impressionism is the blending together of images. The definition of this movement in art is characterized by visible brush strokes, ordinary subject matters, and an emphasis on light and its changing qualities. The first project is an impressionistic landscape using oil pastels and black mat board. Then we're using dye in spray bottles to make colorful geometric designs. Learn about color blending using special tools to create interesting effects in your art journal. And finally, blend colored glue to create a piece of art.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: We are on the move, with projects that go along with us, or move themselves! Join host Katie Hacker and make a rockin' roadster that really rolls. Artist Franz Spohn uses a little string to add animation to his art and blogger Jenny Barnett Rohrs make a wreath with colorful felt pinwheels. Use the Family Craft Box and recycled denim to make a car track. Decorate your room with an eye-catching string art project that uses color to create the feeling of movement.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Take your style to the next dimension. Designer Erin Prais-Hintz uses glittery clay and beads to make her style statement in 3-D. Katie Hacker adds an unexpected style twist with simple rhinestone settings in her Beading Lesson.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Mix up your jewelry-making routine. Designer Kate Richbourg warms up by mixing colors and shapes in her bead palettes. She works out her designs with beads of all sorts. Then, she cools things down with techniques for crimping and creatively finishing necklaces.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Scrapbooking can get very regimented – with the right way to use a product or the correct way to lay out a page. Today we're encouraging a more casual approach – one that fits your life style and design aesthetics. Take a casual approach to your scrapbooking with two "hello" themed pages, scrapbook sketches from Kelly Purkey, and five ways to use lattice designs from Sara Naumann.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Each and every morning is our chance to re-invent our creativity. At the start of the show, Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer demonstrates a sewn book binding technique. Then, take a new look at the night sky with Cheryl Holtz. Finally, Rita Pannullo adds stamping to premade shapes to create dangles for drink stirrers

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Say hello to The Midnight Quilt Show, a series that celebrates late-night stitches, taking shortcuts and sewing in your PJs! Each week, host Angela Walters will bring you a quick and quippy breakdown of a brand new quilt… wine not included.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Learn the steps to becoming a style star by recognizing trends that are spot on. Angela Wolf, our resident sewing super star begins with a kimono style top. Then it's time for another fashion forward look and a jumpsuit with Joanne Banko. It even has a star design.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Vintage styles continue to cycle thru our wardrobes with subtle updates. Gretchen Hirsch epitomizes that vintage style with a lace bolero. Then, it's Kim Montagnese. Watch as she recycles a jacket with vintage details and demonstrates techniques for adding trims, lace and more. The show closes with Joanne Banko sharing tips for cutting and sewing silky fabrics.

programme.title: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to sew with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.sub-title: National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to quilt with CraftsyTV

programme.title: Stunning Stitch Patterns
programme.sub-title: The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Wrangle your odds and ends with this workshop storage project and learn to make a modular organization system with George Vondriska. Using simple materials, George shows you how to make a basic frame with customizeable drawers to hold anything from nails to batteries, or anything else that may be scattered around your shop.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Modern quilting has its basis in traditional techniques that have been interpreted in a slightly different way. Brenda Ratliff explores how to take a traditional design and update it to a fresh modern look. Then, Ginny Robinson has a modern take on a traditional memory quilt featuring raw edge applique. Elaine Bergmann demonstrates three binding tips to give a professional finish to a quilt on the machine tip.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Say hello to The Midnight Quilt Show, a series that celebrates late-night stitches, taking shortcuts and sewing in your PJs! Each week, host Angela Walters will bring you a quick and quippy breakdown of a brand new quilt… wine not included.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Learn how to sew projects that will be well loved and used. First is Reen Wilcoxson with an easy technique for creating baby bibs in the hoop. Then, Emily Thompson makes a folding fabric basket to store sewing supplies or other treasures.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Learn something new about quilting. Kim Montagnese demonstrates inside out, broken quilting featuring the double wedding ring. Then, Joanne Banko has the perfect sewing project for a beginner quilter and a necessity for any sewer, a quilted sewing mat. Create a custom sized mat, complete with pockets to keep commonly used tools handy while sewing.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Leatherworking has deep roots in the Old West. Author Melissa Cable shows how to create a rippled bracelet from a leather strip and embellish with beads. In her second segment, she creates a studded leather bracelet. In Katie's Beading Lesson, learn to wrap wire around stones to create a ring or bracelet.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Make the most of your stamps or create new ones. Julie Fei-Fan Balzer carves her own stamps. May Flaum makes a stamped image pop off the page. Christine Drumheller has a handy gluing tip for clips and charms. Cheryl Boglioli stamps contemporary positive and negative images using gelatin plates.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: It's time to party. Artist Cat Kerr mixes things up with a pendant made in layers. Tool expert Joe Rotella melts glass in a microwave oven to create contemporary jewelry and accessories. Candie Cooper cranks out a one-of-a-kind artsy gift box with a treasure inside. Artist Jane Dunnewold has an art tip.

programme.title: The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Say hello to The Midnight Quilt Show, a series that celebrates late-night stitches, taking shortcuts and sewing in your PJs! Each week, host Angela Walters will bring you a quick and quippy breakdown of a brand new quilt… wine not included.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: Butter Book
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.desc: Join George Vondriska to learn how to create a set of modular planter boxes that serve dual purpose as an inviting bench. programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
programme.desc: At their summer camp competition games, Spence and his big brother Zach find themselves on opposing teams: its the dweebs against the bullies. Can Spence make new friends, overcome his fears and find faith in himself, stand up to the bullies and win a trophy in the process?

programme.title: Tentacle 8
programme.desc: A mysterious computer virus wipes out highly classified personnel files at the NSA, prompting a top secret investigation. Raymond Berry, an NSA operative suspected of crimes against the United States, risks his life to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Susie's Hope
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the inspirational relationship between Donna Lawrence (Emmanuelle Vaguer) a pit bull attack survivor, and Susie (Susie Lawrence), an abused pit bull-mix puppy, as they learn to heal and forgive together.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Surrounded by wealth and living with abundant resources in Manhattan, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie, lives a solitary life lacking only frequently absent parents and friends. Estranged from family, having slacker boyfriend troubles, and fired from her waitressing job, sometimes musician 23-year-old Eleanor needs a new place to live and a new job.

programme.title: Watercolor Postcards
programme.desc: A small town girl with a troubled past returns home only to find that both her sister and her hometown are in peril. Only when she falls for a man who similarly has dark days behind him will they muster up the faith and love needed to save the things they hold dear in life.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Five decades ago, Lawrence Monk Terry was at the top of his game. In 1972 he won a silver medal with the U.S. rowing team at the 1972 Summer Olympics in Munich Germany. His position on the team was an important one. He served as the Stroke. That's the term for the one who sets the pace for the rest of the rowers. Since then, his life has been rowing along merrily. Just recently he was a fit and active retiree until an April day, after Monk was doing housework and decided it was time to come inside that his life would take a pause. What happened next would give a whole new meaning to his revered rowing position, The Stroke.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: A diagnosis of childhood cancer came as a shock to the Shoeneck family who found out about their daughter Kenedi's malignant tumor after an unexpected fall. This episode of Hope is Here proves the power of love and creativity as The Sing Me a Story Foundation pairs Kenedi and well-known songwriter Kat Perkins to create a happy and memorable tune that delivers hope, strength, and laughter to a family who needs a reason to smile.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Our youth and all the experiences that makeup one's childhood, good and bad, can affect the person we ultimately become. Yet we often have a choice in that destiny. Ana Viamonte Ros is a woman who confirms that although insurmountable challenges and negative experiences from the past can shape our future, hard work and a determined, healthy mindset can pave the way toward a gratifying life. Today Dr. Viamonte dedicates her life to helping patients strengthen their mental health and conquer childhood traumas while serving as living proof that perseverance and hope make dreams attainable.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: The way to healing can take on different forms. Little 7-year-old Leonor, was suffering from a very rare cancer, and it was decided she needed an uplifting project to give her hope. What better medicine than an endearing song that was created from Lenore and her sister Dot's imagination and a ridiculously cute and famous dog named Doug the Pug? This episode of Hope is Here is about how a famous dog, creativity, and a group of caring individuals came together to give a little girl a world of hope to carry on. The path to healing can manifest in various ways. Meet Leonor, a resilient 7-year-old girl battling a highly uncommon form of cancer. Recognizing her need for inspiration and optimism, a heartwarming project was conceived. What could be more uplifting than a captivating melody born from the vivid imaginations of Leonor and her sister Dot, accompanied by the adorable and renowned Doug the Pug? In this episode of Hope is Here we witness the extraordinary convergence of a beloved canine, boundless creativity, and a compassionate community, all united to bestow upon a young girl a profound sense of hope for the future.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Parents raise their children to ultimately achieve their independence. Yet removing barriers to attain the goal of independence is filled with great challenges for parents of children with special needs. Hope is Here focuses on a family, a very special foundation, and a Florida hospital system that is going to great lengths to empower individuals with intellectual disabilities with strength, confidence, and a sense of self-worth.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.sub-title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 1 - It Begins
programme.desc: We collect the best poker streamers from Twitch.tv, as well as a few notable Vegas pros, to host our first ever Twitch Celebrity Cash Game. From a secret location in Las Vegas, NV we find out if the streamers can hang with the live players...or vise versa...featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.sub-title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 2 - Rampage
programme.desc: Our exclusive Twitch Celebrity Cash Game is in full swing, and the only thing more outrageous than the personalities is the pot sizes. From a private residence living room in Las Vegas, NV, this is cash game poker at its most entertaining. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.sub-title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 3 - The Kissing Bet
programme.desc: The Twitch Celebrity Cash Game in Las Vegas barrels on into the night as our curated collection of Twitch streamers and Vegas pros swap chips and insults. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.sub-title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 4 - "Damn, Daniel!"
programme.desc: As word gets around Las Vegas that our cash game is in full swing, some notable players stop by and try and get in. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.sub-title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 5 - Psychic Flow
programme.desc: The poker from Las Vegas continues apace, and Phil Laak channels the psychic energy of the universal overmind to hone his poker play. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.sub-title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 6 - Aces On The Felt, Aces That Fly
programme.desc: After losing the biggest pot in Poker Night history, Antonio Esfandiari is slowing regaining ground. Can he continue to build his stack against the best online and live players in Vegas? Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Summer Midwest Fishing
programme.desc: It's late June and right now it's primetime for hot river fishing across the Upper Midwest for a variety of different reasons. Number one would be the low stable flows of the rivers, most of the rivers are also running fairly clear. Number two is it puts fish in fairly identifiable areas in the river thanks to the current. Today's guests is Captain Ben Wolfe of Sport Fish Michigan who targets a wide variety of fish throughout the river systems of Michigan.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.sub-title: Spring Thunder - "Sunshine State Redemption Gobblers | Florida Longbeard Down | Spring Thunder"

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Nebraska Buck | Realtree Road Trips"

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Crazy Rut Chaos In Georgia| Realtree Road Trips"
programme.desc: Filming your own bow hunts can be challenging. Throw in some crazy rut chaos and it can be just about impossible. Bouncing around in a Summit climber proved to be a deadly tactic for Bryan Brown as he was able to get tight to the bedding area where 5 bucks were chasing 1 hot doe.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoor

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoor
