programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton stays close to home and heads to the Lake of The Ozarks joining Austin Culbertson for a frigid couple days of fishing. The cold weather doesn’t hold back the fish, though, as they target brush piles with jerk baits and umbrella rigs.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton and Trevor pack up and drive down to Arkansas for their first experience on the White River. The brothers spend a day in the boat with Bryant Stark of Rising Rivers, fishing the White and the Norfork. Though the White is much larger waters than back home, Trevor utilizes his experience to catch them even while wading.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: C.A. heads to Murrells Inlet, SC for some low country lure slingin'. What's on your menu? Shrimp and grits or Flounder?

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: C.A. Fishes in his home waters for probably the most powerful inshore fish, the gag grouper.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Road trip time! Embrace the frigid temps with CA on this special episode, fishing for the cape Fear Slam.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA fishes with Richard Black in Islamorada. This guy can do it all. Rain or shine, no fish is safe.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: On this episode Capt. Danny joins his good buddy and talented marine artist, Stephen Ferrell. The two of them take the 27’ DekKat to fish some of Stephen’s favorite paddle-board spots here in Melbourne, Florida. Tune in and see what they can make happen on a challenging weather day seeking the elusive Snook!

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: On this Episode, Capt. Danny takes a trip down to the historic Florida fishing village of Cortez. He’s paired up with local Commercial Fishermen Capt. Jarrod McKenzie for an action packed day chasing the Silver King!

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Over a decade after the game changing Longbeard XR was introduced by Winchester, the wait is finally over for their next ground breaking turkey load. After years of perfecting the recipe behind the scenes, Winchester finally unveiled the new Longbeard TSS at a turkey camp in northern Michigan. First watch the jaw dropping Longbeard TSS pattern board testing, then see it go to work on some spring gobblers.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Nestled in the hills of Ohio just west of the Appalachians is a very special deer camp ripe with memories from deer season’s past. With the development of the 350 Legend straight-walled cartridge by Winchester in 2019, a world of opportunities now existed in states like Ohio and Michigan. In this episode, with the 350 Legend in hand, three mature whitetails meet their maker, from the same blind, over the course of three seasons.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: It’s been 60 years since AA was introduced to the shooting sports world. Since that day, an immeasurable number of AA hulls have hit the ground and countless shooters have stood center stage raising a trophy where millions of dollars have been won. Professional and recreational shooters alike have trusted AA for six decades. In this episode, load up for stories of high school, collegiate competitors and the world’s best as they bust clays with the legendary shot shell. - GUESTS: Zach Keenbaum (Team Winchester) Desi Edmunds (Team Winchester) Kayla Wilgus (Team Winchester) Amy Cawley (Team Winchester) Anthony Matarese (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchester’s best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. We’ll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.
Tarif Alkhatibs is new to Team200, but no stranger to killing some - of the biggest free range whitetails in his home state of Texas – - including the state record typical!

programme.title: Global Getaway
programme.sub-title: Getaway - "Scenic Rivers Gems of the Seine 1"
programme.desc: This week on Getaway; cruising the almighty Seine River through France, from Paris up to the battlefields of WWI. Enjoying the food and wine of the area, while learning about the history and experiencing the culture of this glorious region.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Justin and Brandi with Big Dreams Outdoors finish up their slam hunting Merriam turkeys with 7J Outfitters in Wyoming. It was a tough week for Justin but persistence pays off!

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Prepare to embark on an awe-inspiring aquatic journey as "Legendary Pursuits: Conquering the Depths of Port Saint Joe" takes you on an epic fishing adventure like no other. Join us as we cast off into the pristine waters of Port Saint Joe, a coastal paradise brimming with marine treasures waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.sub-title: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve start the season with Capt. Scott Stoky chasing Islamorada Tunas and Mahis offshore out of Plantation Boat Mart.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve catch a mixed bag bottom fishing off of Islamorada with Captain Scott Stoky.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve go yellow tailing out of Hawks Cay for a limit of tasty yellowtail snapper and Steve picks a battle with a big lemon shark.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve bounce around the reefs out of Hawks Cay catching a wide variety of reef dwellers.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve take their brand new Invincible 36’ out of Plantation Boat Mart to fly the kites for some early season sailfishing.

programme.title: Into The Blue

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike and Dallas King take advantage of a powerful summer tide, hooking into an all-out redfish frenzy where the action never slows down.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Capt. Blair meets up with Capt. Ron Ryals to fish the phosphate pits of Bienville outdoors, an amazing spot for hunting and trophy bass catching.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "Half Way There - Chilean Wigeon & Rosy Bill | , South America Waterfowl Slam"
programme.desc: Mark Peterson closes out the half way point on the South America Waterfowl Slam. On just the third day of the hunt, he is able to take a Chilean Wigeon and a Rosy Billed Pochard which make species number 9 and 10 of the 20 on his list. Mark is still sharing the blind with Matt Gindorff, a WTA consultant, and they discuss waterfowl hunting in Argentina and how it compares to that of the U.S.

programme.title: Louisiana Catch and Cook
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Jay Ducote brings along a very special fishing buddy, his dad, for our first-ever Catch & Cook freshwater adventure! We’re heading to the legendary Toledo Bend, famous for its sac-a-lait (Cajun for crappie) and ranked among the top bass lakes in the U.S. It’s a bucket-list stop for anglers everywhere, but trust us, the story doesn’t end with the fish. - Steeped in Spanish, French, and Native American roots dating back to the Louisiana Purchase, this region serves up culture and flavor as rich as its fishing. We’ll be staying at Wildwood Resort, hitting the water with Captain Matt Loetscher of Living The Dream Guide Service, and capping off the day with spectacular lake views from their breezy lakeside bar. - Hook, line, and sinker — you don’t want to miss this one! - Ready to go catchin’ with one of Louisiana’s best captains? Visit www.LouisianaCharterFishing.com to check availability or book your trip today!

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: In this episode the DCD crew heads to the lesser-known but highly productive Red River in Western Louisiana. Despite a slow start to the season, the Red River provides some of the best hunting yet. With mixed bags of woodies, greenheads, and teal. Not to mention a handful of bonus squirrels and wild mushrooms. Shoot straight and come hungry.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Duck hunting in Louisiana is as much about its history as it is about its future. In the season's final days, Jean-Paul learns about Louisiana’s rich waterfowling history, dives into conservation projects throughout the state, and returns to Bayou Black for one last ride. Shoot straight and come hungry because it's the last hunt of the season.

programme.title: Captain's Log

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: Join Will Cooper on an unforgettable adventure in the Colorado mountains, where he dedicated three years chasing elusive bull elk without success. Determined to turn the tide, Will enlists the expertise of his good friend Jermaine Hodge, prior World Elk Calling Champion and Wrestling Coach for the United States Army World Class Athlete Program. Together, they face challenges and overcome adversity during a thrilling public land over-the-counter rifle hunt. Experience the highs and lows of their journey against the stunning backdrop of Colorado's wilderness.

programme.desc: Get ready for thrilling Pro Men's Doubles pickleball action from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships at East Naples Community Park, the National Pickleball Center! This semi-final match features the dynamic duo of Richard Livornese Jr. and Ryler Deheart against the formidable team of Ben Newell and Brandon Lane. programme.title: The Wager
programme.sub-title: The Wager – Rande Gerber & Presley Gerber vs Jason Kennedy & Wes Burrows
programme.desc: In this celebrity charity match set at Rande Gerber’s stunning Malibu home, father-son duo Rande and Presley Gerber take on Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a spirited game of pickleball. With $10,000 on the line for the winner’s chosen charity, the stakes are high and the competition is real. Rande and Presley are playing for the American Family Children’s Hospital at the University of Wisconsin–Madison. With beautiful views, tight rallies, and some surprise shots, this exhibition delivers heart, humor, and heat on the court.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023

programme.title: Pickleball England
programme.sub-title: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
programme.desc: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2022
programme.sub-title: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
programme.desc: The 2022 Picklebowl offers an unforgettable mixed doubles match featuring some of the biggest names in sports. US Olympian Casey Patterson and pickleball pro Chuck Taylor join forces to take on pickleball standout Megan Fudge and former tennis world No. 5 Kevin Anderson. Set against the scenic backdrop of Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event blends elite pickleball play with charity and college pride. Expect explosive rallies, pinpoint accuracy, and powerful serves in this high-energy exhibition that showcases the crossover appeal of pickleball.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2022
programme.sub-title: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
programme.desc: Championship Court hosts a star-studded final as brothers Ben and Collin Johns take on Matt Wright and Riley Newman in this Men’s Pro Doubles finale. Packed with elite strategy, blistering hand battles, and dramatic swings, this is top-tier pickleball at its most intense.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.sub-title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
programme.desc: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.sub-title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 28, 2023 - AZ PBL
programme.desc: March 28, 2023 - it's the Peoria Pythons and the Gilbert Gladiators in a battle for the best - live at The Orchard!

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.sub-title: Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya
programme.desc: In Week 4 of Season 2, the Arizona Pickleball League brings another exciting Tuesday night match at The Orchard. This week, the Peoria Pythons take on the Surprise Stingers, with thrilling moments and intense competition. Featuring standout players like Ryan Trefry, Lauren Mercado, Michael Lloyd, and Nico Montoya, the teams face off in a high-energy battle. From dynamic mixed doubles to powerful gender doubles, every set and game keeps viewers at the edge of their seats. Will the Pythons maintain their momentum, or will the Stingers make a dramatic comeback? Don’t miss this action-packed match full of strategy, drama, and plenty of pickleball!

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.sub-title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Singles - Pre-Medal
programme.desc: Men’s Pro Singles between Yates Johnson and William Sobek in the Pre-Medal match

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.sub-title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
programme.desc: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.sub-title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal
programme.desc: Simone Jardim & Jaime Oncins take on Eva Welsher & Kyle Yates in a Mixed Pro split age Gold medal match

programme.title: Pickleball England
programme.sub-title: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Final
programme.desc: The Men’s Doubles Final from the 2023 English Nationals brings together reigning champ Freddie Powell and partner Louis Laville against titleholder Pep Giuliano and former pro tennis player James Chaudry. With national glory on the line, expect explosive rallies, finesse, and strategic brilliance from both teams.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.sub-title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and James Johnson take on Andrei Daescu and Gabriel Tardio in this Men's Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2022
programme.desc: It's Pickleball pro Matt Manasse & NFL Quarterback Drew Brees versus Pickleball Pro Lew Halski & former NFL player Matt Stinchcomb.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.sub-title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
programme.desc: Straight from The Orchard at Jigsaw Health, Tuesday Night Pickleball brings you a high-octane women’s doubles matchup featuring four elite pros. Anna Bright and Jessie Irvine team up with firepower and finesse to take on the seasoned duo of Lucy Kovalova and Catherine Parenteau.From smart stacking and sharp cross-court dinks to quick hands battles and momentum swings, this match is packed with elite-level tactics and crowd-thrilling rallies. It’s classic TNP: fun, fiery, and full of flair.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.sub-title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles Backdraw Semifinal
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and Milan Rane take on Yana Newell and Yates Johnson in this Mixed Pro Doubles Backdraw Semifinal.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: In the main event, ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven put his GLORY world heavyweight title on the line against number one contender ‘The Prince’ Levi Rigters in a hotly anticipated rematch from their GLORY Grand Prix final earlier this year. GLORY light heavyweight world champion Tarik Khbabez will collide with Donegi Abena in a trilogy fight to end their heated rivalry in the co-main event.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 98 features the highly anticipated return of Jamal Ben Saddik (36-9, 29 KO) against the Estonian powerhouse Uku Jürjendal (20-9, 16 KO). In the co-main event of the evening, GLORY Welterweight World Champion Chico Kwasi (43-5-1, 23 KO) is set to defend his title against number two ranked welterweight Teodor Hristov (18-3, 7 KO). Meanwhile, two of 2024’s best prospects will clash as Cem Caceres (18-1, 14 KO) faces Mory Kromah (31-2-1, 18 KO).

programme.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: The Great Siberian Traverse
programme.desc: The Great Siberian Traverse documents a 6,000-mile ski journey through Russia, along the Trans-Siberian Railway. The documentary, created by Sherpas Cinema in collaboration with Powder Magazine and The North Face, showcases a fringe backcountry skiing community, deep Siberian powder, and skiing�s ancient origins. Team skiers Ingrid Backstrom, Callum Pettit, and Nick Martini share their insights along the adventure.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer stares down seven veterans, will their induction into the arena be successful, or will their inexperience find them in the pit? One robot will have a second chance to qualify in the Redemption Round.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The final heat features only veterans, here for an opportunity to make up for their mistakes in the previous tournaments. Only one competitor will make it into the Grand Finals, and the others must suffer defeat, again.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: After lengthy repairs and inspirational pep talks, the qualifiers prepare to fight for the title. A 10-way Robot Rumble will give the victor a spot in the Grand Finals, alongside the heat winners.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Using competitors own video diaries, exclusive action from the pits and the best of the battles, Philippa Forrester will get down to the nuts and bolts of Robot Wars, The Second Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Philippa goes behind the scenes to find out how the shows fighting machines are made, whilst uncovering the trials and tribulations of their frantic creators.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of Robot Wars Series 2, more exclusive footage and access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of this week’s competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Witness hope, triumph, desperation and defeat as Philippa takes us back to the pits, where competitors make final touches to their Robots, hoping they come back in one piece.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of how the production team setup the arena for contests such as jousting and pinball. Gain an insight as to how competitors construct their robots from team video diaries.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More behind the scenes of the hit series Robot Wars. Philippa gets into the nitty gritty of why competitors choose to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of Robot Wars, see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: See what happens when little kids become big kids, and toy trains are replaced by chainsaws. Watch the teams as they lock themselves in their workshops, creating killing machines.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: Robot fightings newest competition begins! In the first heat, meet new robots and some familiar faces as teams get a feel for the arena and size up their competition. Filmed in Grantham in front of a live audience, robots battle for survival in the Robots Live Arena.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: Heat 2 of the UKs most brutal robot combat competition takes the action to Crawley in the south of England. Winners and losers from Heat 1 face fresh opponents, fighting to secure a win and guarantee their place in the finals.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: Its the last chance for teams to secure a spot before the final. In savage and tactical 1v1 matches, teams battle for a place in the top 16. New robots join the fray, hoping for a last-minute victory to advance to the championship.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: The most battle-hardened combat robots in the UK compete in the MechMania Grand Final. After three grueling heats, only the toughest survive. The tournament is now a single-elimination, 1v1, sudden-death formatuntil one team emerges as the victorious champion.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the Fifth Wars raises the bar for action. With newcomers outnumbering the veterans, will and underdog manage to secure a place in the finals?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer gets a forceful yet thorough tour of the arena hazards in the eliminators. Flippers prove to be this heats weapon of choice and they are put to great effect, as many robots take to the air.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.sub-title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.sub-title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide

programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. programme.title: Four Corners

programme.title: Beach Battles

programme.title: Beach Battles

programme.title: Beach Battles

programme.title: Love On the Rocks

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common?

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Naples
programme.desc: Known for thousands of miles of coastline, Florida’s sugar-fine sand beaches and sunshine attract over 110 million visitors annually. But in the quest for the ultimate beach vacation, it’s important not to overlook what was here before. From wildlife to indigenous peoples, there’s so much more to Southwest Florida than meets the eye. And while there’s a lot of history here, the Sunshine State’s future is looking as bright as ever. It’s easy to see why Florida’s Paradise Coast is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To: Corning and Finger Lakes, NY
programme.desc: It’s a destination known for its natural beauty. A place where sparkling lakes are the backdrop to sparkling wine, served in the sparkling glassware. It’s easy to see why Corning, New York and the Southern Finger Lakes is a place to love.

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Thrill seekers get in on the action at these heart-pumping attractions across America, from an icy trek across Wrangell-St. Elias National park in Alaska to volcano sledding at Hawaii's Volcanoes National Park.

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Ultimate adventures at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from ocean rafting 12-foot waves in Glacier Bay National Park to a 3,000-foot mega slide in the Rockies.

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Mind-blowing marvels at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from Death Valley's mysterious sailing stones to a man-made mirage in Joshua Tree National Park.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Paddle into Dog Surfing in Pacifica, California, and get picking at the Crab Derby in Crisfield, Maryland.

programme.title: Sorted Food: Game Changers
programme.desc: The guys find a different side of New Orleans.

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Off-the-grid adventures at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from a spooky mansion outside of Yellowstone National Park to a UFO watchtower in Great Sand Dunes National Park.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Maine's Coastline
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine’s wild beauty. It’s where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It’s known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you’ll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here’s why Maine is a place to love.

programme.title: Diners Drive Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Brooklyn, Guy Fieri finds a barbecue joint is mashin' up a variety of styles for their unique wings and their big time beef ribs. And in NC, a husband and wife tag-team in the kitchen to deliver soft shell crab quesadilla.

programme.title: Just Landed
programme.desc: Jim kicks off his journey in Virginia Beach, a coastal gem with a deep-rooted fishing heritage. But Mother Nature has her own plans—as storm clouds roll in, Jim has a challenge ahead: tagging his first Redfish for NOAA to help track its migration.

programme.title: Venturing Out: St. Croix
programme.desc: Creighton is joined by recently retired Navy sailor Tanner to try their hand at deep sea fishing, both above and below the crystal clear waves.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony Bourdain loves the energy and edge of big cities.

programme.title: Alaskas Wild Gourmet
programme.desc: The Ewing family give back to Kodiak Veterans by serving them a five star gourmet meal in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Alaskas Wild Gourmet
programme.desc: Surfers hire the Ewings to cater dinner on a secluded beach in Kodiak, but hurricane force winds could mean disaster.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Newport
programme.desc: Welcome to a legendary Ocean destination. With over 300 years of history and miles of coastal beauty, Newport, Rhode Island was once the vacation hotspot for the who’s who of the Gilded Age. Today, it’s still a vacation favorite with stunning architecture, rich history, and an incredible gastronomy scene. Join Samantha as she meets the people past and present who make Newport a Place to Love.

programme.desc: Tony and Andy, a native, dine on roasted pig in Cayey, attend a posh party at a hacienda, search for a chupacabra in the jungle, meet boxing champion Miguel Cotto, and travel to Ponce to take in the Festival of the Virgin Mary.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Meat's the theme of this week's trip, and Guy finds a few spots to call paradise. In Colorado Springs, he has a killer Jamaican curry goat and jammin' jerk chicken. In Baltimore, he goes to a funky beer bar with wild boar sliders.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The Party is in action, and so is the party. Our would be heroes are posing as entertainment to get aboard the rooks ship and steal back the rod before they can escape. - - Will they succeed?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "Our Party, aka Blackwater Bandits, have earned their name stealing back the rod from the Rook. Now its time for one more performance... the disappearing act. - - Will they succeed in this mid-season finale?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Players awake with no memories and must quickly work together to navigate a dangerous dungeon. The extra twist? They have no idea they are playing their actual characters!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has passed the trial! With acceptance into the city of Anwar, their new goal is recovering those stolen memories...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Tragedy has struck the party, a member has fallen. Adding to their strife, they now find themselves in yet another tough situation below Anwar.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Hurtling down the water passageway on the journey to The Dark, the party's boat takes a beating. Luckily for them, this means their captor The Lovely Lute takes a beating as well. Now they must try to continue their mission for the Crystal Rod.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.sub-title: The Short Adventures of Thistle & Arky
programme.desc: Who better to go poking around in goblin tunnels than the only members of the party who will fit inside?! But what Arky and Thistle find in the warrens is not what they expected…

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party finds the dwarven city of Iron Stone. Unfortunately, it is under siege by strange magical creatures. And what has become of that dangerous assassin, the Lovely Lute?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Coming upon the lava-fueled dwarven forge, the party begins to craft anti-magical emerald-imbued weapons. That is, until the whole building begins to shake...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Iron Stone is saved! As thanks, the party receives a bounty of magical crystals and a powerful new iron suit for Arky. Now they head for Rock Bottom, a duegar dwarf city beneath a waterfall in the dark Underground.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Reaching Pelion Darrus, the Party finds it under devastating attack from above and below. One hero makes an unexpected journey, dragging the party into a surprising decision in this weeks episode!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Audio Dungeon crew begin their adventure in the world of Andaria. Finndelar (Tom) the wizard, and Hogar (Dan) the ranger, have just finished their two month journey, and have reached their destination; The Sunken City. Finn's mission is to retrieve a magical device created in part by a local craftsman: Arkie Fint. Hogar, an ally of Finn, was hired to guide and protect him. When they arrive, they find themselves in the midst of a large celebration, as well as a mystery regarding their mission...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finndelar (Tom) and Hogar (Dan) have arrived in the Sunken City and are now searching for the magical device they have journeyed so far for. After meeting the craftsman Arkie Fint, they travel to Smithy's tavern in hope of finding a clue to their mystery...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Smithy's party has proven to be entertaining and everyone is enjoying themselves. Meanwhile, during the festivities, Bludgy, the city's most notorious thief is seen sneaking upstairs, drawing the attention of others. Finn and Hogar's mission hangs in the balance...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finn and Hogar are tied up below Smithy's tavern along with a few others. Bludgy is about to sell off the crystal rod for a life changing amount ofgold, while Arkie is "retrieving" something important from his workshop.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party, now in possession of the CRYSTAL ROD, has fled from the thieves in the Sunken City through the underground tunnels. Once outside, they discover the Queen's forces are invading from the sea, bombarding the city. They quickly slip out beyond the walls, north of the city... but to go where?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has been caught trying to escape and with them, the Artifact. Eventually they wake up shackled to a cart, and surrounded by guards on their way back into the occupied Sunken City… at the mercy of the Queen's Forces.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The party has adjusted to their new lives the best ways they know, how but they are eager to escape. - - Follow the party as they continue working their 9 to 5 jobs with only one lunch break and four 15 minute coffee breaks fun by the evil Queen’s forces."

programme.title: Road to the Unthinkable
programme.desc: The Quest for the Motorcycle Triple Backflip (narrated by Johnny Knoxville)òis the story about the attempt for the most dangerous trick in the history of action sports. The Road to the Unthinkable recounts the progression of the motorcycle backflip.ò The film tells the story of the very first competitive backflip by Carey Hart in 2000, Travis Pastrana landing his iconic double backflip at the X Games six years later, and finally the legendary quest of three men (Travis Pastrana, Thomas Pags, and Josh Sheehan) to ride away from worldís first motorcycle triple backflipîa feat thought to be totally impossible.ò This is the story of the dramatic evolution of what is possible and the athletes who risk life and limb to redefine the boundaries of human performance. òòA full decade and a half after the first motorcycle backflip was attempted, the death-defying triple backflip was finally within reach. THE ROAD TO THE UNTHINKABLE follows this quest as three FMX riders and close friends push each other to the edge and back and try to write their names in the history books.ò ò

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator’s text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: "Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment. Toys, along with the audience, learn about colors, shapes, objects, come out of difficult situations, learn about friendship and the world in general. The series is simple, kind and funny.

programme.title: Beyond Normal

programme.title: Between Fjords

programme.title: Surfing Morning of the Sun
programme.desc: Stunning contemporary surfing mixed with classic surfing from the 1970's. A inspirational homage to the classic surf films of the 1970's like Morning of the Earth. This is one the finest of its genre and noted for the original score.

programme.title: Not By Chance
programme.desc: Trevor Gordon builds a surfboard in 2 days, sails the Atlantic, and rides waves with it.

programme.title: Ice Edge
programme.desc: Ice Edge follows surfers shaping ice boards, battling nature in a poetic tribute to Lofoten.

programme.title: The Arena: North Shore
programme.desc: Every winter on the North Shore of Oahu, the best surfers in the world come to charge the infamous Bonzai Pipeline to prove their worthiness. It is on the deadliest wave in the world where young surfer's careers are sprung into superstardom.

programme.title: The Essence of Surfing
programme.desc: The Essence of Surfing is a riveting surf documentary that gets to the heart of why surfing is the greatest sport in the world. Featuring surfers of all kinds, from the neighborhood grom to some of the greatest surfers to ever live, The Essence of Surfing uncovers what it is about this awesome sport that makes it a necessary part of each of their lives. Shot in the world's most beautiful locations by top notch Cinematographers Erik Ippel and Mike Prickett, this film is sure to hook and inspire anyone looking to get wet and catch some waves.

programme.desc: Archys story is one of survival through surf stardom at an early age, fame, drugs, alcohol, sponsorships and the surf rock star lifestyle. Compelling interviews, and explosive surf action from the 80s, 90s, 2000s and beyond.

programme.title: Discovering Mavericks
programme.desc: This is the story of those who risked their lives, some paying the ultimate price, for the ultimate ride. Executive produced by Mavericks legend Jeff Clark and directed by Joshua Pomer. Winner of the Newport Beach Film Festival 2013 Audience Award.

programme.title: Cluster
programme.desc: This is our bookmark. Our full stop. It is an actual document of individuality and modern surfing and living and romping and laughing. Collect it and recollect on it. Here we are now, entertain us. And well take it from there.

programme.title: Fish: The Surfboard Documentary
programme.desc: Fish: the Surfboard Documentary, covers the impact the fish surfboard made on surf culture. A deep look at the origin and impact of the Fish Surfboard design and how it would influence surf culture 30 years later. - A look at what happens when a creative San Diego surfer invents a board with a brand-new shape, and the whole surfing world hops aboard for the ride. THE FISH SURFBOARD DESIGN was created by Steve Lis in the San Diego Cliffs area in 1967, and became HUGELY popular in the 1990's.

programme.desc: Angela Wolf shows how to thread a serger.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Serging Knits
programme.desc: Angela Wolf demonstrates serging knits.

programme.desc: Learn how to make a beautiful skirt with pockets!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Adding Pockets to Joggers
programme.desc: Learn how to add comfortable pockets to your joggers.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Turn a Sports Bra to a Tank Top
programme.desc: Lean how to turn your sports bra to a tank top!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Lace Insert Knit Top
programme.desc: Learn how to make a lace insert knit top with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Tank Top Lace Trim
programme.desc: Learn how to make a comfortable tank top with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: One Armed Tee
programme.desc: Learn how to make a one armed tee with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Sparking Tableware
programme.desc: Learn how to make sparkling tableware with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: T-Shirt Dress
programme.desc: Angela shows how to create a dress out of a simple t-shirt.

programme.title: Learn Origami
programme.desc: In Japanese Origami literally means "folding paper". In this programme learn the art of origami with designs that are both simple and rewarding. From the purity and ease of a rowing boat, to the intricacies and precision of a lover's knot, or a flapping bird. These are classic origami designs that will hopefully lead to a love of the craft.

programme.title: Learn to Sew
programme.desc: Have you always wanted to learn how to Sew? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get strated and then move on to some simple projects such as making a lined tote bag to practise what you have learnt. You will find out what equipment you'll need, larn some brilliant tips to make beautiful creations including a patchwork cushion and elasticated skirt!

programme.title: The Stitchery: Coffee. Macrame. Dyeing. Tangents.
programme.desc: Trying to macrame a coffee cup and then dying it with real coffee

programme.title: The Stitchery: A Goodwill Fabric Haul for the Ages
programme.desc: A good old haul video, but it's just super cheap fabric

programme.title: The Stitchery: Homemade Lotion Bars - A Satisfyingly Short Project
programme.desc: Making my own lotion bars at home

programme.title: The Stitchery: I Made a Water Fountain Dog Bowl for My Puppy!
programme.desc: Trying out concrete crafting to make a fountain bowl

programme.title: The Last Beekeeper
programme.desc: Other documentaries have done a fantastic job explaining in great detail the scientific nature of CCD. What the Last Beekeeper seeks to do is humanize the bees and tie them to very human stories. CCD is an environmental crisis, but until it hits home on a personal level, there will be no hope for change. After all, the plight of man and the plight of bees have been linked for centuries and at no time in history has that relationship been more strained.

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Gardening and More
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, Lynn creates her very own herb garden!

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: May Celebrations
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we're in the kitchen for an apple crisp recipe and wine pairing for your next family and friends get together.

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Making Summer Memories
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we're celebrating summer memories.

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Father's Day
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we're celebrating summer fun and Father's Day.

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Flip for Summer Crafts & Recipes
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we're celebrating summer fun with dessert charcuterie.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Topstitching and Changing Pocket Angles
programme.desc: Update your wardrobe! Learn how to topstitch and change pocket angles.

programme.title: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor
programme.desc: Marketing executives Kristen and Dave bought their modest first home a few years ago and undertook the much-needed renovations themselves. They did a great job removing walls and installing a new kitchen but then ran out of steam. Now they need designer Samantha Pynn's expertise to pull their open concept kitchen/dining/living room together and turn it into the beautiful modern space that they had originally envisioned.

programme.title: Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom
programme.desc: Designer Samantha Pynn creates an eco-fabulous bedroom for 16-year-old Lindsay that perfectly balances youthful without looking childish - and still allows for room to grow.

programme.title: Pure Design: Carolyn & Derek's Attic Loft
programme.desc: Designer Samantha Pynn transforms an unimaginative third floor loft into a fun, colorful, bohemian-inspired family room that matches homeowners Carolyn and Derek's personalities.

programme.title: Pure Design: Ania & Walter's Master Bedroom
programme.desc: Too much space is not always a good thing, but with a little planning, designer Samantha Pynn is able to transform Ania and Walter's vast bedroom into a luxurious, earth-friendly boudoir.

programme.title: Pure Design: Liliana and Frank's Living/Dining Room
programme.desc: Frank and Liliana's 1930s home gets fast-forwarded to the 21st century as designer Samantha Pynn uses environmentally friendly furniture and fresh accessories to update the look of classic English Revival.

programme.title: Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen
programme.desc: The cottage-style charm that Virginia fell in love with when she bought her city home has lost its appeal. Designer Samantha Pynn takes it from outdated to 'Modern Country' - with an eco-twist.

programme.title: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom
programme.desc: For many first-time homeowners, decorating - especially private spaces like the bedroom - is definitely last on the list. That's certainly the case for Tiffany, an up and coming PR executive. By refreshing some of Tiffany's vintage furniture and bringing in some modern pieces and sustainable choices, host Samantha Pynn takes Tiffany's dorm-like bedroom with its mish-mash of furnishings and transforms it into an eclectic and soothing space, full of the sophistication a professional woman deserves.

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we celebrate Strawberry season with a healthy treat from healthy Chef and Partyologist Nancy Waldeck.

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Springtime for the Whole Family
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we make spring floral door wreaths and candy wrapper bracelets.

programme.title: Learn to Knit
programme.desc: Have you always wanted to learn how to Knit? Well nows your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get started and then move on to some simple projects such as making a scarf. You will find out what equipment you'll need, learn different knitting stitches and then finishing techiniques and some great tips for your future knitting projects!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Color
programme.desc: This episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell is our ode to color — intermediate stitch techniques, a look at different types of dyed fibers, and a project that shows off beautifully water-colored yarn!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Bag
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we go bag crazy! We share some of our favorite project bags; learn how to crochet a boho-inspired purse; take a field trip to an artisanal mill to see how yarn is made; knit a felted bag made unique with different hardware and straps, and get a quick tip for how your favorite knitting tool can also be used as an integral part of your next, big bag!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Global
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we celebrate our global community by focusing on yarns, techniques, and designers from around the world.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Yarn Trends
programme.desc: On The Trends Episode (#101) of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we focused on the state of the art of knitting, today. We covered yarn trends, popular items to make, modern applications of techniques, new products, and more!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Vintage Touches
programme.desc: Old school style rules this episode as we focus on the stitcherly details, like crocheted edgings and antique buttons, that give a project a vintage touch.

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Heart Quilt
programme.desc: Make an awesome heart quilt and add just a little hand stitching to your new quilt along with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Old Vintage Quilt
programme.desc: Create a vintage inspired quilt with buckeye beauty quilt blocks along with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting Small Table Mat
programme.desc: Learn sugar bowl quilt block and make a beautiful small quilt along with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting Triangles and Scraps
programme.desc: Make a quilt with scraps, learn foundation piecing and simple sewing with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Summer Quilting
programme.desc: This summer, create a "trip around the world" quilt and learn to sew with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Simple Unconventional Heavy Quilt
programme.desc: Make a heavier quilt using a blanket as batting. learn some unconventional quilting ideas!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Adding Colorful Binding to a Quilt
programme.desc: Binding 101- how to bind a quilt.

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Adding Saching and Cornerstones to a Quilt
programme.desc: Learn how to add sashing and cornerstones with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Cross Hatching Quilting
programme.desc: Beth is finishing up her cross hatch quilt!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Drunkard's Path Quilt
programme.desc: Learn "Drunkard’s Path" quilt block with Beth! Make your own template of any size!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting Vintage Stars
programme.desc: Make some pretty vintage looking stars with Beth today!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting a Bag
programme.desc: Sew an awesome bag with Beth! No worries, it's simple!

programme.desc: SonUva Digger’s Ryan Anderson attempts to win back-to-back event championships while closing the gap in his quest for a third straight series title. programme.title: All The Pizza

programme.title: The Jackie Robinson
programme.desc: After a successful baseball career in college and as a coach in the military, Jackie Robinson (playing himself) attracts the attention of Major League Baseball's Branch Rickey (Minor Watson). Rickey wants Robinson to play in the minor leagues, believing he can become the first player to break the color barrier and play in the majors. The only catch: He is forbidden from defending himself against racial bigotry. Supported by his wife (Ruby Dee), Robinson is steadfast in his determination to win.

programme.title: DREAMTOWN

programme.title: While I Breathe I Hope

programme.title: A THOUSAND MIDNIGHTS
programme.desc: This experimental documentary chronicles the contemporary manifestation of the economic and social histories of Black Americans who came to the north during the Great Migration in search of economic opportunities. The implications of their migration, and the lack of economic opportunity they encountered, has far reaching consequences for Black America today.

programme.title: A Legend in the Classroom: The Life Story of Ms. Yvonne Busch
programme.desc: Born in New Orleans in 1929 and raised in the historic TremĂ© section of the city, Ms. Busch, who mastered several brass instruments and the woodwinds, became a touring professional by the age of 12. Later in life, she provided the foundation for scores of New Orleansâ€™ finest musicians, who excelled in careers in jazz, R&B and gospel, by teaching them the rudiments of music.

programme.title: The Story of Lovers Rock
programme.desc: Lovers Rock, often dubbed â€�romantic reggaeâ€™ is a uniquely black British sound that developed in the late 70s and 80s to house parties, club and sound systems. Lovers Rock developed into a successful sound with national UK hits (Silly Games/Janet Kay) and was influential to British bands (Police, Culture Club, UB40)

programme.title: CLOSURE
programme.desc: Angela, an African-American raised by a Caucasian couple in a large, multiracial family in Washington State, comes face to face with her birth mother for the first time, and meets family members who had never known she was even born â€“ including her birth father.

programme.title: Gershwin And Bess
programme.desc: Details of the operaâ€™s inception and the cast, as well as Ms. Brown's controversial run-ins with discrimination, offer an illuminating historical account. programme.title: Shout At The Devil
programme.desc: During World War One, an English poacher, an American adventurer, and his attractive young daughter set out to destroy a German battle-cruiser awaiting repairs in an inlet just off Zanzibar.

programme.title: The Devastator
programme.desc: Santiago. Violent warfare erupts in Northern California when Vietnam vet Deacon Porter reassembles his Combat Strike Force to avenge the death of a commanding officer.

programme.title: Barbarian Queen
programme.desc: Set during the days of the Roman Empire. A simple village is raided by Roman troops, and most of the people are whisked off to be slaves or killed. Three women survive and set off to liberate their people. When they arrive at the Roman city, they team up with the local underground to seek vengeance and liberation of the slaves.

programme.desc: Martha and Chef Costas Spiliadis of Estiatorio Milos make Taramosalata and salad; they build an eggplant and zucchini tower with tzatziki; then, they salt-bake a fish served with yogurt.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Succulents are known for their vibrant colors, interesting textures, and often beautiful blooms. Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Learn as Martha transforms one cake recipe into three dazzling frosted cakes: strawberry ombre cake, zesty lemon mousse cake, and berry layer cake covered Swiss meringue swirls

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Martha shares for her techniques for preserving and incorporating dried fruit into three recipes: Eccles cakes, steamed currant pudding (spotted dick), and Moroccan Fruitcake

programme.desc: Martha presents how to add lemon into three delicious recipes: lemon and Italian cheese pizza, a sublime lemon coffee cake, and lemon souffle tart

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet Million Dollar Dream Home Erika & Sonny. They just moved from Chicago and are looking for the perfect Orange County home for their family. They are going to see three very unique luxury properties in the OC area. Will these Chicago transplants find the perfect West Coast home?

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: Luxury home buyers Lulu and Dave set out to tour three exquisite properties in the vibrant city of Palm Springs, California. As they explore these luxurious homes, they seek the perfect blend of desert charm, modern design, and upscale living. Will they find what they need?

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet Ziba, a stay-at-home enterpriser. She is looking for the perfect home for her and her husband. She's about to see three luxury properties around Los Angeles. Which one of these million-dollar homes will suit their needs? They see a beautiful modern home in Luxury Bel Air with stunning views and a sleek and sophisticated masterpiece with all the bells and whistles.
